project_type: Python script that parses insurance premium PDFs and generates XLSX with lookup functionality
build_system: None - standalone script, run directly with python3
test_framework: No formal test framework - verification via running the script and inspecting output
verification_instructions: 1. Run generate_excel.py without errors. 2. Verify output xlsx is valid ZIP. 3. Verify two sheets exist named Konvensional and Syariah. 4. Verify shared strings contain correct header text. 5. Verify formula cells exist in sheet XML. 6. Verify data tables are present for lookup.
snapshot_or_generated_files: Tabel_Premi_MiUHC.xlsx is the generated output file, produced by running generate_excel.py
setup_instructions: No setup needed - uses only Python stdlib (zipfile, xml, zlib, re, os)
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network mode - no pip install possible. Must use only Python standard library. No openpyxl, xlsxwriter, or any third-party packages. The XlsxWriter class must build XLSX XML manually.
contribution_requirements: Single file script that generates the Excel. Must be self-contained.
key_patterns: The existing XlsxWriter class builds xlsx from scratch using zipfile. Currently only supports shared string cells (type='s'). Needs to be extended to support: (1) formula cells (type omitted, <f> element), (2) number cells (type omitted, <v> with numeric value), (3) data validation (for dropdown lists), (4) merged cells. PDF parsing uses zlib decompression of streams and regex extraction of TJ/Tj operators.
relevant_files: /projects/sandbox/kirodev/B. Tabel Premi Miuhc Versi Quick PDF Per Sep 2025 (3).pdf
/projects/sandbox/kirodev/B. Tabel Premi Syariah 2024 - Miuhc Versi Quick PDF (3).pdf
directory_structure: Single directory /projects/sandbox/kirodev/ containing: generate_excel.py (main script), two PDF source files, output xlsx, and one video reference file (not playable in this environment)
